Lea Newkirk.title: clouds deserve love too!
Lea Newkirk.body: 15d  • General 💭clouds deserve love too!I was just watching the clouds drift by and seeing all the different pictures they create, it’s such a beautiful reminder that the universe is always showing us exactly what we need to see if we just take a second to look up. (highly recommend looking up)HAPPY BEST DAY EVER!

Lea Newkirk.author: Dr. Stephen Buscema
Lea Newkirk.text: Couldn't agree more! I consider clouds to be "earth jewelry." And daydream clouds are my kind of jewelry.

Lucas Premat.author: Lucas Premat
Lucas Premat.text: I know about them, but how do you integrate, can you give advice?

The discipline to do what you planned no matter what is PRIMARY. Then you need to program your environment to help you, not sabotage you. If a person doesn't know what fucks up their motivation, mood and willpower or what gives him strength, it's the first thing he needs to do. Know thyself. After that comes aligned action. Another big one is to understand that you only need to win the internal battle in the moment. To go through the lowest point, deepest darkness... and finish the day on top. It's not about perfection, almost nobody knows how to integrate these habits while living a normal life. I failed soooo many times... Key is to keep coming back to the path and not give up. . . so this is the core of integration. . . what habits would you like to integrate Lucas?

Lucas Premat.author: Lucas Premat
Lucas Premat.text: I know about them, but how do you integrate, can you give advice?

Lucas Premat.author: Dr. Stephen Buscema
Lucas Premat.text: Now, that was a good hook.

I look at people different, I love being around people and love talking to the

Pastor Adil.author: Pastor Adil
Pastor Adil.title: PALM SUNDAY 🌴
Pastor Adil.body: 26d  • 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 The Hope FamPALM SUNDAY 🌴 Happy Palm Sunday! 🌿 Today we remember the triumphant entry of Jesus into Jerusalem, when people welcomed Him with palm branches and joyful praise. May this special day remind us to open our hearts to Christ, walk in humility, and trust in God’s perfect love and salvation. May your life be filled with peace, hope, and the blessings of our Lord as we prepare our hearts for the victory of Easter. ✝️🙏

Pastor Adil.author: Dr. Stephen Buscema
Pastor Adil.text: Thank you for sharing this with us, Pastor.

Matt Miller.author: Matt Miller
Matt Miller.title: Gratitude for Good Friday ✝️
Matt Miller.body: 🔥21d  • 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 The Hope FamGratitude for Good Friday ✝️Good Friday is not just about what Jesus *endured*—it’s about what He *accomplished*.On the cross, Jesus didn’t simply make forgiveness possible; He reconciled us to God. The hostility was removed. The debt was canceled. The relationship was restored. As Paul says, “God was in Christ reconciling the world to Himself, not counting their trespasses against them.”And here’s where it gets personal for us:That same ministry of reconciliatio

Matt Miller.author: Dr. Stephen Buscema
Matt Miller.text: Ahh, this is awesome. Thank you brother.

Hans Starkweather.author: Hans Starkweather
Hans Starkweather.title: Prayer request
Hans Starkweather.body: Mar 10 (edited) • 🙏🏾 Prayer RequestPrayer request So I'm out here trucking, decided to layover in a small town. Go for a walk, run into a fellow man whom he too professes Christ. He's been hitchhiking all over Western part of America. And footin it the rest of the time. We talked about Christ for a little bit. But he did let me know his knee has been hurting and I said I'd pray for him. Now I'm asking anyone who reads this if you could do the same. Thank you. His name is Brandon
